heading: Step 4: Create the MongoDB Vector Search index.
body:
Run the following code to create the MongoDB Vector Search index for
the vector store to enable vector search over your data:

```python
# Use LangChain helper method to create the vector search index
vector_store.create_vector_search_index(
   dimensions = 1024 # The dimensions of the vector embeddings to be indexed
)
```

> **Tip:** [create\_vector\_search\_index API reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/index/langchain_mongodb.index.create_vector_search_index.html)

The index should take about one minute to build. While it builds,
the index is in an [initial sync process](troubleshoot-initial-sync)
state. When it finishes building, you can start querying the data
in your collection.

codeBlocks.content:
# Use LangChain helper method to create the vector search index
vector_store.create_vector_search_index(
   dimensions = 1024 # The dimensions of the vector embeddings to be indexed
)
